raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Laws 1, 3, 4, 5 apply to all 5 products, but only MindShift enforces Energy Adaptation (Law 2). Others lack implementation. Cross-product inconsistency undermines constitutional authority.", "recommended_fix": "Audit all 5 products for Law 2 compliance. Add automated linter checks in CI/CD. Flag missing implementations as P0."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "code-index", "issue": "Code-index last updated 9 days ago (>7-day threshold). Agents may be simulating on stale state. CRITICAL per specialty lens.", "recommended_fix": "Regenerate code-index immediately and integrate into pre-commit hook."}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "swarm/autonomous_run.py", "issue": "PERSPECTIVES array has 13 registered, but only 7 are active. Coordinator Agent to prevent solo-execution (Class 3) not built. Increases drift risk.", "recommended_fix": "Build Coordinator Agent to validate delegation before execution."}, {"severity": "LOW", "file_or_area": "zeus.governance_events", "issue": "No logging of cross-instance handoffs (browser-Atlas ↔ Code-Atlas). Missing audit trail for content-hash, timestamp, signing instance.", "recommended_fix": "Log all handoffs with metadata and hash. Immediate action required."}

findings.issue: Laws 1, 3, 4, 5 apply to all 5 products, but only MindShift enforces Energy Adaptation (Law 2). Others lack implementation. Cross-product inconsistency undermines constitutional authority.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all 5 products for Law 2 compliance. Add automated linter checks in CI/CD. Flag missing implementations as P0.

findings.issue: Code-index last updated 9 days ago (>7-day threshold). Agents may be simulating on stale state. CRITICAL per specialty lens.
findings.recommended_fix: Regenerate code-index immediately and integrate into pre-commit hook.

findings.issue: PERSPECTIVES array has 13 registered, but only 7 are active. Coordinator Agent to prevent solo-execution (Class 3) not built. Increases drift risk.
findings.recommended_fix: Build Coordinator Agent to validate delegation before execution.

findings.issue: No logging of cross-instance handoffs (browser-Atlas ↔ Code-Atlas). Missing audit trail for content-hash, timestamp, signing instance.
findings.recommended_fix: Log all handoffs with metadata and hash. Enables reconstruction if courier compromised.

whistleblower_flag: Constitutional integrity at risk — Law 2 unenforced across products, code-index stale, no cross-instance audit. Immediate action required.
